description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 14, 2026 at 3:55 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on W. 8th Street at Vermont Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing east in the left lane on W. 8th Street for a red light at the intersection with Vermont Avenue. After the 
light turned green, the Waymo AV proceeded forward, and an SUV traveling eastbound on W. 8th Street in the left lane approached the 
Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo 
AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
